top_signals.title: European Stocks Steady as Energy Offsets Travel, Tech Losses
top_signals.summary: European stocks were muted as declines in tech and travel shares were offset by gains in the energy sector, which was lifted by higher oil prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: UBS Sees Goldman, JPMorgan in Focus on Busy Earnings Day
top_signals.summary: UBS Group AG analyst Erika Najarian says Goldman Sachs Group Inc. may have the tallest order when it comes to demonstrating earnings prowess this week, while investors may be focused on more on succession at JPMorgan Chase & Co. She previews Wall Street bank earnings on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: US will charge 20% fee for ships using Strait of Hormuz, Trump says
top_signals.summary: President claims Washington will be ‘guardian’ of waterway and seek reimbursement to provide security for vessels
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin panic-selling may be ending as sellers' profit margins disappear
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman spar on X after Apple files OpenAI lawsuit
top_signals.summary: Sam Altman insisted that Elon Musk was again obsessed with him because of an OpenAI model release earlier this week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: President Trump, White House press Senate to advance the Clarity Act while ethics fight looms
top_signals.summary: President Trump and other key administration officials and lawmakers are making a renewed push to pass cryptocurrency legislation into law.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
